ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Mango, flesh without skin, pitted, raw
Passion fruit, flesh without skin, with seeds, raw

ingredients_text: 14% Mandarin-Orangen, 14% grüne Melone, 13% Pfirsiche, 13% blaue Weintrauben, 9% Ananas, 9% Mango, 9% Aprikosen, 9% gelbe Melone, 7% Maracujasaft aus Maracujasaftkonzentrat, 3% Fruktose.
